entities.name: N5
entities.context: V's personal knowledge and automation system organized into distinct layers

entities.name: Zo Chat
entities.context: User interface for interacting with N5 via slash commands and natural language

entities.name: Command Layer
entities.context: N5 layer handling user-facing workflows and shortcuts (N5/commands/)

entities.name: Script Layer
entities.context: N5 layer handling core automation and processing (N5/scripts/)

entities.name: Data Layer
entities.context: N5 layer managing knowledge, lists, records, and config via schemas and files

relationships.context: N5 contains the command layer as its user-facing workflow interface
N5 contains the script layer for core automation
N5 contains the data layer for persistent storage
Zo Chat serves as the user interface layer for N5
Command layer calls into script layer in the system architecture
Script layer reads from and writes to data layer
